properties.name: app.api.version-prefix
properties.description: API version prefix for HTTP endpoints.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange used for audit processing messages.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.routing-key
properties.description: Routing key used to publish audit processing messages.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.queue
properties.description: Queue name for audit processing messages.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.retry-processing-routing-key-1
properties.description: Routing key for retry processing stage.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.dlq
properties.description: Dead letter queue name for audit processing failures.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.retry-routing-key-1
properties.description: Routing key used to route retry messages.

properties.name: app.audit.processing.retry-queue-1
properties.description: Retry queue with TTL for delayed retries.
